999 Not Applicable
45 oop_tier_label Label of Post-OOP Threshold Tier Char 2 Text label selected by the Part D sponsor that describes the post out-of-pocket threshold (catastrophic) phase limit formulary tier. Note, this field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost Shares do not apply. 00 No Label
01 Formulary Generic
02 Formulary Preferred Brand
03 Formulary Brand
04 Non-Formulary Generic
